<!--
Filling this template lets reviewers (and machines) parse the PR quickly.
Tick boxes by replacing [ ] with [x]. Leave blank lines under the prompts.
See CONTRIBUTING.md for recipes and validation commands.
-->

## Change Summary
<!-- 1-2 sentences. What changed and why? -->

## Change Type
- [ ] Add new entity / entities
- [ ] Update existing entity (specs / year / sources)
- [ ] Add typed relations
- [ ] Migrate `specs` → `sourcedSpecs` claims
- [ ] Add funding round(s)
- [ ] Add person(s)
- [ ] Fix dead source URL(s)
- [ ] Add image(s)
- [ ] Tooling / schema / docs (please describe in Summary)

## Affected entity IDs
<!-- Comma-separated list, e.g. ind-figure, person-brett-adcock, f4 -->


## Sources cited
<!-- For each entity/claim added, paste the source URL. Reviewers will
spot-check that the URLs are alive and that the cited facts match. -->


## Validation
<!-- Required for any data change. Tick after running. -->

- [ ] `python3 research/_tools/validate_schema.py` → 0 errors
- [ ] `python3 research/_tools/build_api.py` → completed without warnings
- [ ] `python3 research/_tools/health_report.py` → no new regressions in TL;DR
- [ ] If image added: `process_image.py` ran with no warnings, output at 1000×1000
- [ ] If new entity: synthetic card generated (`generate_synthetic_cards.py`) if no real image

## Diff stats (auto-fillable)
<!-- Run `git diff --stat origin/main..HEAD` and paste the summary line. -->

- entities affected:
- net new sources:
- net new typed relations:

## Agent metadata (if AI-generated)
<!-- Optional, for auditability — not gating. Leave blank if human-authored. -->

- Generated by:
- Prompt template: (link to CONTRIBUTING.md §7.x or describe)
- Manual edits beyond agent output:

## Reviewer checklist
<!-- For the human merging this. -->

- [ ] Every new fact has a source URL.
- [ ] No fabricated numbers / dates.
- [ ] HEALTH.md TL;DR grades didn't drop a tier.
- [ ] `npm run lint` still produces only the documented pre-existing errors.
- [ ] No `.env`, `raw_images/`, or `_health_cache/` staged.
